section.heading: Press
section.body: Dr. Nair has been the subject of coverage in Quanta Magazine, a widely circulated science publication recognized for its editorial selectivity and its audience of educated readers well beyond the boundaries of any single academic discipline. Quanta Magazine does not publish routine announcements or press releases; its editorial process targets researchers whose work is deemed sufficiently significant to merit explanation to a broad, non-specialist audience. Dr. Nair's inclusion in that coverage reflects an independent editorial judgment that her contributions rise to a level of interest and importance extending beyond her immediate peer community. This type of media recognition—originating from a publication that is neither sponsored by nor affiliated with Dr. Nair's institution or field—constitutes the kind of press coverage contemplated by this criterion.

disclaimer: This is general informational guidance only, not legal advice. Immigration law is fact-specific and changes frequently. An attorney of record licensed to practice law is required to review your petition and advise on your situation before anything is filed with USCIS.
